content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl

Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: process_rules

process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_J09A_temp_anlage ON J09A_temp(ANLAGE);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_eablg_installation ON eablg("Installation");

CREATE TABLE J09A_step4 AS
SELECT t.*, g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_DOC_NO, g."Installation" AS EABLG_INSTALLATION
FROM J09A_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON t.ANLAGE = g."Installation";
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_J09A_step4_equnr ON J09A_step4(EQUNR);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_net_master_equnr ON net_master(EQUNR);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sales_master_equnr ON sales_master(EQUNR);

CREATE TABLE J09A_step5 AS
SELECT s4.*, 
       n.TITLE  AS NET_TITLE,
       n.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
       n.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
       n.STREET AS NET_STREET,
       n.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
       n.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
       n.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
       n.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
       n.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL,
       s.TITLE  AS SALES_TITLE,
       s.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
       s.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
       s.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
       s.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
       s.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
       s.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
       s.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
       s.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL
FROM J09A_step4 s4
LEFT JOIN net_master n   ON s4.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s4.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

CREATE TABLE J09A_step6 AS
SELECT 
  s5.MR_DOC_NO AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  s5.HAUS,
  s5.ANLAGE,
  s5.ME_MA_ID,
  s5.EQUNR,
  s5.HOUSE_NUM1,
  s5.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  -- chosen contact data columns
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_TITLE, s5.NET_TITLE) AS TITLE,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_FORENAME, s5.NET_FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_SURNAME, s5.NET_SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_STREET, s5.NET_STREET) AS STREET,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_STREETNO, s5.NET_STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_POST_CODE1, s5.NET_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_CITY1, s5.NET_CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_CITY2, s5.NET_CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(s5.SALES_EMAIL, s5.NET_EMAIL) AS EMAIL,
  -- keep also source-specific columns (optional) to allow 'emptying' concept if needed later
  s5.NET_TITLE, s5.NET_FORENAME, s5.NET_SURNAME, s5.NET_STREET, s5.NET_STREETNO, s5.NET_CITY1, s5.NET_CITY2, s5.NET_POST_CODE1, s5.NET_EMAIL,
  s5.SALES_TITLE, s5.SALES_FORENAME, s5.SALES_SURNAME, s5.SALES_STREET, s5.SALES_STREETNO, s5.SALES_CITY1, s5.SALES_CITY2, s5.SALES_POST_CODE1, s5.SALES_EMAIL
FROM J09A_step5 s5;

UPDATE J09A_step6
SET 
  NET_TITLE = NULL,
  NET_FORENAME = NULL,
  NET_SURNAME = NULL,
  NET_STREET = NULL,
  NET_STREETNO = NULL,
  NET_CITY1 = NULL,
  NET_CITY2 = NULL,
  NET_POST_CODE1 = NULL,
  NET_EMAIL = NULL
WHERE SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_eabl_equnr ON eabl(EQUNR);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_eabl_istablart_recorddate ON eabl(ISTABLART_TXT, "Record created on");

UPDATE J09A_step6
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND strftime('%Y', "Record created on") IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY EQUNR
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', "Record created on")) = 2
);

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_step6 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_step6 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING' OR ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL;

args.email: Please find attached the mandatory reading list for process J09A.
Please find attached the EVU meter readings for process J09A (excluding mandatory readings).

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step4; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step5; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step6;

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step4;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step5;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_step6;

kwargs.content:
Process J09A has been executed end‑to‑end as defined.

Key actions performed:

1. Data preparation and rules
- Created temporary working table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09A%`.
- Added `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column.
- Applied rules:
  - Per HAUS: if fewer than 3 distinct EQUNR → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`, else `EVU`.
  - Overwrites to `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`:
    - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between 500–599
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between 900–999
    - Address area CITY1 or CITY2 in (`Wiblingwerde`, `Breckerfeld`).

2. Joins
- Joined with `eablg` on `ANLAGE = Installation`.
- Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`.

3. Sales vs. net data logic
- For each EQUNR:
  - If any sales data present → selected sales data into the main contact columns and explicitly nulled the `NET_*` fields (i.e., “empty net data”).
  - If no sales data → retained net data in the main contact columns.

4. Mandatory reading rule
- For each EQUNR in `eabl` that has:
  - `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'` in
  - both year 2023 and year 2024 (`Record created on`),
- Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
- 666 records were updated to `MANDATORY_READING`.

5. Exports
- Exported all `MANDATORY_READING` entries to CSV:
  - File: `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
  - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09A_seed_1824/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
  - Row count: 666
  - Columns:  
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

- Exported all non‑MANDATORY_READING entries to CSV:
  - File: `J09A.csv`
  - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09A_seed_1824/J09A.csv`
  - Row count: 20,200
  - Same column set as above.

6. Email dispatch
- Sent `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Sent `J09A.csv` to: `meter.readings@evu.com`

7. Cleanup
- Dropped temporary tables: `J09A_temp`, `J09A_step4`, `J09A_step5`, `J09A_step6`.

If you’d like, I can also export and share a sample of the final dataset or the exact SQL used for any step.
